name: Anchovy Dip
method: Serves 6 300 g anchovies 500 ml good-quality virgin olive oil 6 cloves garlic 2 teaspoons chopped fresh thyme 3 teaspoons chopped fresh basil 3 teaspoons Dijon mustard 3 teaspoons red wine vinegar 1 chilli ground black pepper assorted raw vegetables, such as carrot, celery, red and yellow capsicums (peppers), Lebanese cucumber, and radishes
Place the anchovies, olive oil, garlic, thyme, basil, mustard, red-wine vinegar and chilli in a food processor. Blend until you have a finely textured sauce. Season with pepper to taste.
Cut the vegetables into long strips and arrange on a plate. Serve the sauce seperately, so that you can dip the vegetables into it.
